Notice Of Motion And Motion On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Aug-21-2019 Continued To Aug-29-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

There being no appearance, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

PETITIONER HAROLD BRANDEL'S Motion On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is continued on the court's own motion to August 29, 2019.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
